data.title: Wabtec beats Q4 expectations with $2.10 EPS and $2.965B sales. FY2026 forecast: $10.05-$10.45 EPS, $12.190B-$12.490B sales. Analysts raise estimates.
data.description: Westinghouse Air Brake Technologies Corp (NYSE: WAB) exceeded expectations with their fourth quarter earnings report. They reported quarterly earnings of $2.10 per share, surpassing the analyst consensus of $2.08 per share. The company's quarterly sales totaled $2.965 billion, also beating the estimated $2.864 billion. For FY2026, Westinghouse Air Brake anticipates an adjusted EPS of $10.05-$10.45, as compared to market projections of $10.23. Sales for the fiscal year are expected to fall within the range of $12.190 billion-$12.490 billion, exceeding estimates of $11.977 billion. The company is pleased with the solid performance in the fourth quarter and for the full year. Further details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Correction made to news release by Ramp about launch of Accounting Agent to automate bookkeeping with real-time close on 12-Feb-2026.
data.description: Ramp has announced the launch of Accounting Agent on 12-Feb-2026, to streamline bookkeeping processes with a real-time close. The company revealed that the initial news, disseminated by Ramp through PR Newswire, was inaccurate due to transmission errors.

data.title: Houston-based EWR Digital acquires Modalpoint to strengthen oil & gas marketing authority, founded by Mark LaCour.
data.description: On February 12, 2026, EWR Digital, an energy and industrial marketing company located in Houston, revealed the purchase of Modalpoint, a well-regarded brand in the oil & gas market insight and commercialization strategy sector. Modalpoint was established by industry expert Mark LaCour.

data.title: Nexon (3659.TO) releases earnings for Q4 and full-year 2025. Leader in online games, fin. results announced.
data.description: NEXON Co., Ltd., a prominent player in the online gaming industry, recently disclosed its financial performance for the fourth quarter and fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2025. The company, listed as 3659.TO, reported its earnings for this period.

data.title: Standard Chartered reduces Bitcoin, Ethereum targets for 2026; Bitcoin forecast lowered from $150,000 to $100,000. ETH also affected significantly.
data.description: Standard Chartered has adjusted its 2026 price predictions for Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) and Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) for the second time in less than three months due to ongoing macroeconomic challenges and ETF outflows. The new forecast anticipates Bitcoin reaching $100,000 by the end of 2026, down from the previous prediction of $150,000 and significantly below the initial projection of $300,000. Analysts caution that Bitcoin may see a decline to around $50,000 amid general market instability, ETF redemptions, and macroeconomic uncertainties. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Ambience Healthcare's AI platform expands "chart awareness" across capabilities, interpreting full patient records.
data.description: A prominent company in San Francisco, Ambience Healthcare, known for its AI platform in clinical documentation and revenue integrity, has recently disclosed enhancements to its services by introducing broader "chart awareness." This advancement allows artificial intelligence to analyze a patient's complete medical history, encompassing previous notes, diagnoses, lab results, imaging scans, prescribed medications, pathology reports, and issue lists. The system utilizes this knowledge directly in documentation and coding processes. This innovation aims to improve the efficiency and accuracy of capturing clinical conversations through AI scribes.

data.title: Hexaware and CareInsight partner to accelerate AI-driven healthcare transformation, aiming to revolutionize the industry.
data.description: Iselin, New Jersey - Today, Hexaware Technologies (NSE: HEXT), a renowned provider of IT services and solutions worldwide, revealed a significant partnership with CareInsight, an AI-native healthcare technology firm. This collaboration marks a pivotal moment in the industry as it merges the expertise of both companies to enhance healthcare services using AI technology. This partnership aims to revolutionize healthcare by incorporating cutting-edge AI solutions.

data.title: Angelalign Technology Inc. (6699.HK) to cease use of certain software features in European countries, minimal impact on users.
data.description: A company known as Angelalign Technology Inc. (6699.HK) announced that following a ruling from the Unified Patent Court in Düsseldorf, Germany, they are required to temporarily halt the use of specific software features that automatically update treatment plans. This ruling, which applies to select European countries, will not significantly affect the orthodontists and patients using the company's clear aligner products, with Spain, Switzerland, the United Kingdom, and Ireland exempt from the decision. Angel has plans to introduce iPlan as an alternative option in response.

data.title: Model ML has acquired Captide to provide AI agents with corporate disclosure data; Model ML recently raised $75m in funding.
data.description: A company called Model ML has acquired Captide, a top financial data layer that transforms intricate worldwide corporate filings and disclosures into LLM-compliant documents and data for AI agents. This acquisition comes shortly after Model ML secured $75 million in funding from prominent US and UK investors. The move enhances Model ML's AI workflow builder, allowing its AI agents to accurately collect, analyze, and reference global filings. Earlier in the year, the company had also achieved noteworthy developments.

data.title: KnowBe4 appoints Kelly Morgan as Chief Customer Officer to oversee global operations and customer services.
data.description: In Tampa Bay, Florida, KnowBe4, a leading platform focusing on human and agentic AI risk management, has appointed Kelly Morgan as Chief Customer Officer. In this capacity, Morgan will supervise the worldwide lifecycle of the organization and manage KnowBe4 Customer Success, Customer Support, Managed Services, and Professional Services divisions. This announcement arrives during a period of growth for KnowBe4 as they further establish their presence globally.

data.title: Wedbush defends AppLovin's strong Q4 performance with revenue of $1.658B and adjusted EBITDA of $1.399B, lifting price target. Stock declines despite earnings beat.
data.description: Shares of AppLovin Corp (NASDAQ: APP) are experiencing a decline despite the company's impressive fourth-quarter financial results. The tech company exceeded Wall Street expectations with revenue reaching $1.658 billion, marking a significant 66% increase year-over-year. Adjusted EBITDA stood at $1.399 billion, while earnings per share were reported at $3.24, surpassing estimates. Following the earnings release, Wedbush raised AppLovin's price target, anticipating significant gains over the next year. Despite the strong performance, the stock is receding from recent highs. Wedbush remains optimistic about AppLovin's growth potential post-earnings sell-off, emphasizing the substantial upside.

data.title: PEPE price prediction: Analysts target $0.0000070-$0.0000072 despite mixed signals, RSI at 35.04, bearish MACD.
data.description: The market sentiment for PEPE is uncertain as the Relative Strength Index (RSI) stands at 35.04, indicating a neutral stance. Analysts have set price targets for the stock between $0.0000070 and $0.0000072, but the current bearish momentum shown by the Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) signals a conflicting trend.
